transcript.text:
It's 1 person, but ordering 10 servings? [A portion of the advertisement earnings will be donated to child welfare facilities to help children in need]
It's lamb chops today [A portion of the advertisement earnings will be donated to child welfare facilities to help children in need]
[10 servings gone]
I have to be somewhere to eat more
[What?!]
[Gopchang for 2nd round!]
[This is someone that just had lamb chops...?]
I wasn't going to eat that much today
But it's so good
2 more servings, please
This is not right...
I've never seen anything like this
Hello everyone
I'm going to eat some lamb chops tomorrow
KT came out with an AI call secretary service
This service will assist small business owners in case they are too busy to pick up the phone

Even if the business is closed for the day,
the AI service will pick up the phone 24/7
Let me try to call and use this feature to make a reservation for tomorrow
I hope it can understand me Let's give it a try
Hello, I am the AI call secretary for the restaurant "Ramuzin"
How can I help you?
What is the address?
[What... it's so smart...]
Please let me know if you need assistance with anything else
When are they open?
[It answers all of your questions with ease!]
Is there parking?
Free parking for 60 minutes
I want to make a reservation
Okay, let me help you with the reservation
[That's so cool!]

When is the date of visit?
1 person for tomorrow at 11AM
February 23rd, Wednesday 11AM for 1 Person
[Correct!]
Should I proceed?
-Yes, correct -Please answer with "Yes" or "No"
Yes
Your reservation has been complete
We will send a text message once the store confirms this reservation
I wonder if this works
I want to leave a message for the owner
Please leave a message for the owner after the tone
[Beep]
I made a reservation for 1 person
Please prepare 10 servings of lamb chops for me
Thank you

This service for "Ramuzin" was provided by the AI call secretary
Have a nice day
This really works!
Even at such a late hour
Very cool
I got a text
A text confirming the reservation
Let's eat some lamb chops tomorrow!
[The next day at 11am]
[Ramuzin] [Guro Digital Complex Location]
I made a reservation yesterday and just got here
The call went pretty well
But it was an AI... I hope it went through
Let's head inside
-Hello -Hello!
I made a reservation yesterday

-Is it for 1 person at 11am? -Yes!
You're eating 10 servings by yourself...?
[10 servings of lamb chops!]
10 servings, right...?
Yes
Should I order?
The AI call service already placed the order for you
Thank you
I did it at a very late hour, so I wasn't sure if it went through But it did!
[10 servings of lamb chops]
Thank you
[2.3kg total]
Do you do the grilling?
Please let us know if you need more vegetables
[Looking delicious]
I received a notification for the reservation when I was resting at home

And it was 10 servings for 1 person
I was shocked
That smells amazing
Try a piece
Original flavor
It's delicious
I've never been to a place that specializes in lamb chops
First time eating it cooked rare
The texture is soft and tender
I love the scent
With some sauce
It's so convenient that you're grilling for me Thank you
[It tastes best when a professional cooks it for you]
The meat is tender and not dry at all!
The scent it gives off is really nice even when it's cooked rare
[Eggplant on top]

That's good!
It goes really well with eggplants and scallions
-Here is the rib -Thank you
The meat on the bones is really soft!
Tomato
I wonder if it pairs well with lamb chops
So tasty
The meat is very tender and tasty
The lamb gives off a distinct smell in a good way
I thought you didn't like vegetables
I don't, but it tastes good with meat
They cut it so that it's easier for me to eat from the bones
I used the AI for the first time yesterday
It was very convenient It even told me about parking
Yes! We get more reservations through AI now than us physically answering the phone
It must be so convenient

Yes, because we're able to accept reservations even when we're closed
Our sales have gone up too
[It's a very smart feature]
Our customers love it
It also affects us if we have to pick up the phone while the restaurant is busy
So the AI takes care of that if we're not available
I'm going to need 1 for my restaurant too
As a whole now
Tender
It's hard to cook lamb chops thoroughly, but it's well done
[Cutting the meat is not an option for her...]
[Some cooked scallions]
[More meat on the grill...]
I'm at peace knowing that someone's cooking for me
[Thanks to the owner]
You're so good at eating

Did I sound like an AI?
[From AI to AI]
[The sponsors love it]
What's this?
Garlic rice
That's so good!
Garlic rice,
Lamb meat,
[Nom nom]
Fishcake soup
It was my first time using the AI service
I'm interested in getting the service
How much does it cost?
It's 22,000 Won per month They have a promotion right now so it's free for the first 3 months
Are there more features other than reservations?
Business hours, parking information,

Right, that's so convenient
[You like that?]
[Good job!]
Let's make a skewer
It's like a chicken skewer
That's so good I'm happy
[Some sauce]
[A bite with garlic rice]
Wrap it with an eggplant
Good with scallions, eggplants, and onions
[With cooked garlic]
This is the best lamb chop I've ever had
I was waiting for you to eat 20 servings
I have to be somewhere else after this to eat more
Last!
[10 servings of lamb chops finished]

I just finished the lamb chop mukbang
I made a reservation for dinner today
But I ate this way too fast
So I need to change the time of the reservation
[On a call with the AI call secretary]
-How can I help you -I would like to change the reservation
There is a reservation for Feb 23, Wed at 7PM
-Would you like to change it? -Yes
I can assist you with that
Please say the wanted date and time
Feb 23, 4PM for 1 person
Feb 23, 4PM for 1 person Would you like to make the change? -Yes
Please answer with either "Yes" or "No"
Yes!
Your reservation has been changed
Please let me know if you need assistance with anything else

Does it taste good?
Hello, I'm an AI call secretary
What can I help you with?
I'm done
Thank you
-Have a good day -Thank you
I had a reservation at 7pm, but it's changed to 4pm now
Let's head over to our next restaurant
[Gopchang Paneun Gogitjip] [Seoul, Mapo-gu]
Hello~!
We've been waiting for you
-I made a change in reservation through the AI -Yes, it went through just fine
It was initially at 7pm, but the change was made to 4pm
This is for you
[Touched...]
[Thank you so much]

-Here's the menu -Thank you
You must like Tzuyang?
I'm a huge fan
I watched all her videos
You do a lot of charity work
I started donating money myself after seeing your videos
Thank you
I just had a meal
Can you recommend me something?
The beef gopchang is popular
The jjol-jjol meat is something you can't have at other places
Shiraegi rice & soybean stew combo
3 servings of gopchang,
3 servings of jjol-jjol meat
[This is the jjol-jjol meat!]
[Let's get the smokey flavor on that meat]

[Beef gopchang (small intestines)]
[Jjol-jjol meat] (A special cut of pork)
It's out already? Thank you
[Some jjol-jjol meat first]
What was this again?
It's a part of the meat that's on the pig's ribs
It's located right inside the ribs right here
Only 2 of these pieces from 1 pig
That's such a valuable cut of meat
I used the AI call secretary feature to make this reservation
I think it's really convenient
It's very convenient for us too
We're busy grilling for the customers, going back and forth the kitchen
And if we get a phone call, it's chaotic
I get a real-time reservation notification through my watch
So I can confirm it while I'm serving other customers

Very convenient
Is it okay to eat it now?
[Now it's ready]
Dip it in ssamjang (soybean seasoning paste)
It's a chewy texture
You know that sticky flavor Like a cheek meat
[With some kimchi too]
He recommended to pair it with white kimchi
The perilla white kimchi is really delicious
It's creamy How do I explain this?
With some wasabi on top
[Nom nom]
Scallion salad too
[Nom nom]
[With spiced bean sprouts too]
The limited cut parts of the meat are the best

[Fueling]
Let's cook the gopchang
Looks delicious
Amazing
I don't think this will be enough
Eating all of this by yourself...
It surprises me every time
I didn't even know there was an AI service for phone calls
How did you find out about it?
I saw an ad on TV
And knew right away that it was for me
I got it as soon as they launched the ad
I've been using it for 6~7 months now
I'm paying about 11,000 Won per month
What? 11,000 Won?
The other owner was paying 22,000 Won

So if you register now, you will get the first 3 months for free
And for the next year, you will pay 11,000 Won
And it's 22,000 Won per month after that
[Approval from the sponsors]
You sound like a KT employee
[Hello KT]
Dear small business owners, The AI picking up the phone for you is a good enough reason alone
Confirming the reservation, changing the reservation, All of that can be done through your phone
So I recommend it Thank you
You're supposed to be promoting your food
Yeah, something seems wrong here
[We'll hire you!]
It's completely filled with fat!
It's packed all the way
[How will it taste to the true gopchang lover...?]
[Seal clap]

The outside layer is thin and it's completely filled
So good
Can it be this good? This is cheating
I wasn't planning on eating too much But it's so good
Can I add 2 more servings? Just 2 servings
I've done business for 20 years And it's my first time seeing anyone eat 20 servings
Beef heart
That's so good!
Thank you
Soybean stew
Wow, this is rice?
[Shiraegi rice] (dried lettuce leaf)
This gopchang is my top 3 on the list
[The visuals on this shiraegi rice]
The texture of the rice is really nice
I love how the scorched rice feels in the mouth

These are all cooked
Thank you It's really good. It's the best
This is really really really really delicious
[Now focusing on eating]
[Shiraegi rice+soybean stew cleared]
[Finished with gopchang as well]
I'm going to come back here with my friends
Really?!
-If you can make the reservation through the AI -Right!
[We love it!]
I wonder how it will be like on your end
This is AI call secretary
-Should I help with a reservation? -Yes
We will send a text message once the store confirms this reservation
I received a message just like that
Oh, so it's all done now?

No, upon checking that,
I need to go to the KT AI app
It tells me that there's 1 request that needs to be handled
Click the "reservation" You can see that it's pending
All you need to do is confirm and complete
I got a text!
[That's so convenient]
I love how easy it is to make a reservation
I benefit so much from this feature
This is almost free if it's only 11,000 Won per month
It's like using an employee or even half an employee
Seriously, for just 11,000 Won?
-Thank you for today, I had a great meal -Thank you
I got to eat delicious foods today using the KT AI call feature
The owners are very satisfied with the service
I think it's also good to know that this isn't just for restaurant owners

but also for all business owners like nail salons or flower shops
Even places that require 24 hours of service like hospitals or clinics
They are currently using this service as well [I hope that the AI call service will be a help to all of the business owners during the pandemic]
It will be convenient for all of us [A portion of the advertisement earnings will be donated to child welfare facilities to help children in need]
Thanks everyone [A portion of the advertisement earnings will be donated to child welfare facilities to help children in need]
